school.name: The Schoolhouse
school.description: Each teacher at the schoolhouse leads a different class in a different room. Work out who teaches what, and where.
clues: The class in the Greenhouse's grade is lower than both the Biology class' grade and the class in Period 2's grade.
Between Annex and Cloister, one goes with 93% and the other with 98%.
The class in Period 2's grade is at most 8% away from the Art class' grade.
Library goes with exactly two of Ellis, Biology, 88%, and Period 3.
Library goes with at least two of Boyd, English, 83%, and Period 4.
Either 83% goes with Biology or Frost goes with 93%.
The class in the Annex's grade is between Dunn's grade and the class in Period 3's grade.
98% goes with either Nash or Greenhouse (but not both).
Between Frost and Chemistry, one goes with Cloister and the other with Greenhouse.
Ellis' period is immediately next to the class in the Studio's period.
Exactly one of these is true: Ellis goes with Cloister; Frost goes with Biology; Geography goes with Period 2.

chess.name: The Chess Club
chess.description: Regulars at the chess club each swear by a different opening, a favourite tactic, and a prized set. Work out who plays what.
clues: The player who loves the Skewer's rating is lower than both the French player's rating and the player who placed 4th's rating.
Between Fork and Gambit, one goes with 2185 and the other with 2285.
The player who placed 4th's rating is at most 100 away from the Benoni player's rating.
Zugzwang goes with exactly two of Garry, French, 2085, and 3rd.
Zugzwang goes with at least two of Anatoly, London, 1985, and 2nd.
Either 1985 goes with French or Mikhail goes with 2185.
The player who loves the Fork's rating is between Boris' rating and the player who placed 3rd's rating.
2285 goes with either Vera or Skewer (but not both).
Between Mikhail and Italian, one goes with Gambit and the other with Skewer.
Garry's placing is immediately next to the player who loves the Zwischenzug's placing.
Exactly one of these is true: Garry goes with Gambit; Mikhail goes with French; Pirc goes with 4th.
